description_long: This stool features a round, plush, dark brown leather cushion with a slightly tufted center, giving it a soft and inviting appearance. The seat is supported by three slender, tapered wooden legs that angle outward, providing stability and a touch of mid-century modern flair. The leather upholstery has a subtle sheen and visible creases, suggesting a comfortable, well-padded surface. The legs are finished in a dark wood stain, complementing the rich tone of the seat. There are no visible backrests or footrests, emphasizing its minimalist and functional design. The overall construction appears sturdy yet lightweight, suitable for use in public spaces such as cafes, waiting areas, or urban parks.
description: A round, dark brown leather-cushioned stool with three tapered wooden legs and a tufted seat, exuding a mid-century modern style. The stool is plush, stable, and visually inviting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full, rounded leather cushion and all three angled wooden legs clearly.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the seat's tufted center and the symmetry of the legs.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the plushness of the cushion and the outward splay of the legs.
description_view_3: Another angled view showing the seat's texture and the dark finish of the legs.
